publishedAbstract: After upgrading to ODF 4.16 an error can be seen in the openshift-storage namespace `$ oc get events` or rook-operator logs such as seen below: ``` Warning ReconcileFailed cephblockpool/builtin-mgr failed to reconcile CephBlockPool "openshift-storage/builtin-mgr". failed to create pool "builtin-mgr".: failed to create pool "builtin-mgr".: failed to initialize pool ".mgr" for RBD use.: rbd: pool already registered to a different application. ```
publishedTitle: After upgrade to ODF 4.16 cephblockpool/builtin-mgr  error can be seen.
